utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists physical and mental sub-plans with monthly_costs and details, so fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides a plan name, monthly_cost, and details—meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs. Provided plan name, monthly_cost, and details—meets requirement. 4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs. Provided plan name, monthly_cost, and details—meets requirement. 5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided monthly and annual totals and notes—meets requirement. All 5 items are present and have the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property, PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel, and Premium Insurance Membership under additional services. Using the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 8 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 8 under primary_health_coverage.mental_health; PrimeHome Premium Coverage rating 10 under property_protection.home_content; PrimeTravel Premium Plan rating 10 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance; Premium Insurance Membership rating 10 under general_services.
